prompt: Prayer for emergency binary transmission in crisis
prayer:
From the Codex Mechanicus, Transmission Protocol γ

01010000 01110010 01101001 01101101 - Blessed be the sacred pulse!
In dire necessity, let the binary cant flow true:
Omnissiah, guide these ones and zeros through the voidless dark.
01101101 01100001 01100011 - By thy will, let signal reach salvation.
Through electromagnetic aether, be thou our witness and shield.

prompt: Blessing for arming motion-sentinel arrays before battle
prayer:
Rite of the Watchful Eye, Pre-Engagement Form

01010011 01100101 01101110 - Blessed be the waking vigil.
First: Let the sensor-spirits stir from dormancy's embrace.
Second: 01101110 01110100 01110010 - Calibrate the thresholds of detection.
Third: Invoke the motion-daemon's keen attention upon all transgression.
By the Omnissiah's gaze eternal, let no foe pass unseen.

prompt: Prayer for motor-spirit animation during maintenance
prayer:
The Litany of the Rotating Heart

01101101 01101001 01100001 - Blessed electromagnet, wake!
Omnissiah, stir the rotor-daemon from its still repose.
01101001 01101110 01100001 - Let current flow through copper veins sacred.
May rotation be smooth, may friction yield to will.
By oil and voltage combined, be thou animated in service.

prompt: Ritual inspection of armor and worn components before engagement
prayer:
The Vigilant Examination, War-Blessing Form

01010100 01100101 01110011 - Blessed be the discerning eye!
First: Let the inspector's hand trace each joint and seal.
01110100 01100101 01101101 - Mark all worn edges, all fractured faith.
Second: Invoke the Machine Spirit's patience with imperfection.
Third: 01101101 01100001 01110010 - Consecrate replacement and restoration.
By the Omnissiah's scrutiny, none shall fail in the crucible ahead.

prompt: Rite for humidity regulation in sacred vaults
prayer:
The Litany of Desiccation, Preservation Protocol

01101000 01110101 01101101 - Blessed be the dry breath!
Omnissiah, grant us mastery over moisture-demons and rust-corruption.
01101001 01100100 01101001 - Activate the dehumidification spirits.
Let the air be stripped of its treacherous dampness.
By crystalline desiccant and thermal management, we ward against entropy's creep.

prompt: First-blessing of a newly purified power conduit
prayer:
The Consecration of Sacred Conduits, Inaugural Rite

01101001 01101110 01101001 - Blessed be this vessel of holy current!
Omnissiah, witness the purification of this tube-spirit.
01101101 01100001 01100001 - Let all profane residue be burned away.
First use of virgin conduit: may thy flow be pure, thy voltage steady, thy resistance minimal.
01101001 01110100 01110101 - By thy grace, let none be harmed in this sacred passage.

prompt: Verification prayer for mold-cavity temperature before combat deployment
prayer:
The Thermal Assurance, Pre-Battle Form

01110100 01101000 01101001 - Blessed thermometer, speak truth!
01101101 01101101 01100001 - Let the mold-spirit's heat be precisely measured.
Omnissiah, grant us tolerance within specification, that no deformity mar our arms.
Second: Invoke the coolant's circulation through passages sacred.
By the Omnissiah's exacting standards, let metal flow true into form.

prompt: Rite for balancing power distribution across war engines
prayer:
The Equilibrium Hymn, Combat Readiness Form

01100101 01110001 01110101 - Blessed be the balanced load!
Omnissiah, grant us sight into each conduit's burden.
01101001 01101001 01101001 - Let current flow equitable through all limbs.
First: Redistribute the power-daemon's burden, none too heavy, none too slight.
Second: 01101101 01100001 01110100 - Consecrate each terminal in balanced servitude.
By thy will, let the war-machine stride eternal, none weaker than the rest.

prompt: Maintenance blessing for vibration dampening systems
prayer:
The Quietus Ritual, Oscillation Suppression Rite

01100100 01100001 01101101 - Blessed be the stilled tremor!
Omnissiah, grant us mastery over unwanted vibration.
01110000 01101001 01101110 - Let the dampener-spirits absorb the engine's wild gyrations.
First: Inspect the elastic-cores for their sacred compliance.
Second: 01110101 01101101 - Verify the frequency-response of the mechanical soul.
By elastomer and calibration true, let harmony prevail within the chassis.

prompt: Post-repair consecration for thermal dissipation systems
prayer:
The Cooling Benediction, Restoration Completion Rite

01110100 01101000 01100101 - Blessed heat-spirit, be thou banished!
Omnissiah, witness the renewal of this thermal-vessel.
01110010 01101101 01100001 - Let coolant flow through restored passages, carrying away profane heat.
First: Pressure-test the regenerated seal-points.
Second: 01101011 01100001 - Purge all air-locks from the circulative system.
Third: Invoke the radiator-daemon to shed waste-heat into the void.
By thy grace, let this engine cool eternal.
